subject: Headphones not pairing with my laptop

messages.text: I bought the wireless headphones yesterday and they won't connect to my laptop at all. I've tried restarting both devices. This is really frustrating!
I ordered a USB-C Hub but received a charging cable instead. I need this for a work presentation today. Please fix this immediately!

subject: Keyboard key feel different than described

messages.text: The keyboard is okay but the tactile feel is quite different from what the listing described. Is there a return policy I should know about?
Just wanted to say the monitor stand arrived next day and it's exactly what I needed. Great product and fast shipping!

subject: Speaker battery life shorter than advertised

messages.text: The speaker sounds great but the battery only lasts about 4 hours, not the 10 hours advertised. This seems quite misleading.
